libs_implemented: Implemented in numpy from scratch (pywt missing): causal a-trous MRA (backward dilated Haar averaging, detail d_j=s_{j-1}-s_j), and a centered non-causal MRA used ONLY to demonstrate the look-ahead leak. Numerical prefix-recompute causality proof. Backtest/PSR/DSR from engine.
notes: Causal a-trous MRA (Haar-style, past-only, dilated 2^j). Proved no future-sample leak: recomputing the transform on prefix x[:t+1] reproduces band_t to machine eps for the CAUSAL transform, while the textbook CENTERED transform changes (it peeks ahead) and that non-causal band trades at an absurd ~7.7 Sharpe (the leak made explicit). STANDALONE sign(mid band) is band-pass momentum/reversal: IS-selected source=ret band=4(~5.3d cycle), OOS Sharpe=-0.24 ret=-11.5% PSR=0.377, FAILS within-family DSR SR*=0.0533 over 73 variants. OVERLAY (|mid-band| amplitude gates long-BTC): base OOS Sharpe=0.10 maxDD=-54.9% -> gated OOS Sharpe=0.26 maxDD=-47.3% (PSR=0.634). As priors predicted, directional band-pass timing does not survive cost+deflation; verdict=DEAD, role=none.
data_caveats: close-to-close 8h perp closes; maxDD is close-to-close (no intra-bar liquidation/gap modeling -> optimistic). Causal a-trous edge-pads first 2^j bars with x[0] (early bars slightly biased; immaterial OOS). Standalone book is directional (long+short per-coin sign), NOT market-neutral.
